name: Cold Zucchini and Leek Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 leeks, white part only, cut into ½-inch slices
4 scallions, both white and green parts, cut into ½-inch slices
5 zucchini, unpeeled, cut into ½-inch slices
4 small white potatoes, peeled and cut into ¼-inch slices (about 2 cups)
½ teaspoon Each, marjoram, thyme, rosemary, and savory
1 cup Whipping cream, or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil and butter in a 4 to 5 quart saucepan.
2. Saute the leeks, onion, scallions, garlic, zucchini, and potatoes until slightly softened, about 5 to 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Add chicken stock and lemon juice, then bring to a boil.
4. Add salt, pepper, and herbs. Simmer until vegetables are soft, approximately 25 minutes.
5. Puree the soup in several batches using a blender or food processor.
6. Stir in Worcestershire sauce and cream (add more cream if the soup is too thick).
7. Allow to cool, then refrigerate. Serve cold, garnished with chives. Serves 6 to 8.
